channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Vietnam Boat Tragedy Updates: "Boat Had Barely Begun Moving, Tipped Over Before We Could React": Survivor

media:content.media:description: Vietnam Boat Tragedy: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident

item.description: Indian Tourists Killed in Vietnam Boat Incident News Updates: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident. There were a total of 36 people on board the vessel.
item.content:encoded: Indian Tourists Killed in Vietnam Boat Incident News Updates: At least 15 Indians, including 13 men and 2 women, were killed in the incident. There were a total of 36 people on board the vessel.

item.title: Iran Officials Admit To "Mistake" After Attacks On Ships In Hormuz: Report

media:content.media:description: White House wants Iran to acknowledge that the attacks violated the ceasefire

item.description: According to the officials, Tehran blamed the incidents on an "errant" faction of hardliners that allegedly acted to derail ongoing negotiations.
item.content:encoded: According to the officials, Tehran blamed the incidents on an "errant" faction of hardliners that allegedly acted to derail ongoing negotiations.

item.title: US Lawmaker Ro Khanna Detained By Israeli Settlers During West Bank Visit

media:content.media:description: Most countries and the United Nations regard Israeli settlements in the West Bank as illegal.

item.description: Khanna is the second Democrat considering a White House bid to visit the region this week.
item.content:encoded: Khanna is the second Democrat considering a White House bid to visit the region this week.

item.title: 15 Indian Tourists Killed As Boat Overturns In Vietnam

media:content.media:description: The embassy added that local authorities are working to establish the exact details of the incident.

item.description: Search and rescue operations are underway, and the Indian mission has set up control rooms to assist those affected.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1126023/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Search and rescue operations are underway, and the Indian mission has set up control rooms to assist those affected.

item.title: Scare Force One? Report Flags Security Gaps In Trump's New Plane

media:content.media:description: The White House defended the new plane's safety.

item.description: The Qatari jet is acting as a stopgap until two brand new Boeing Air Force Ones are delivered later this decade following a series of delays. After that, it is due to be donated to Trump's planned presidential library.
item.content:encoded: The Qatari jet is acting as a stopgap until two brand new Boeing Air Force Ones are delivered later this decade following a series of delays. After that, it is due to be donated to Trump's planned presidential library.

item.title: "A Good Indian Is A Dead Indian": Truck Drivers Reveal Abuse In Australia

media:content.media:description: Indian-origin truck drivers across Australia say racist abuse has become a grim reality of the job

item.description: While an Indian-origin truck driver was speaking in Punjabi at a truck stop in South Australia, someone spat on him and disappeared before he could even react. The attacker was another truck driver.
item.content:encoded: While an Indian-origin truck driver was speaking in Punjabi at a truck stop in South Australia, someone spat on him and disappeared before he could even react. The attacker was another truck driver.

item.title: China Evacuates Over 1 Million As Typhoon Bavi Nears

media:content.media:description: Taiwanese authorities registered at least 113 injuries from Typhoon Bavi.

item.description: Earlier, at least 17 people were killed in the southern Philippines, mostly due to landslides that were set off by seasonal monsoon rains that Bavi intensified before the typhoon blew away toward Taiwan, Philippine officials said Saturday.
item.content:encoded: Earlier, at least 17 people were killed in the southern Philippines, mostly due to landslides that were set off by seasonal monsoon rains that Bavi intensified before the typhoon blew away toward Taiwan, Philippine officials said Saturday.

item.title: NYT Journalists Summoned After Report On New Air Force One's Security Gaps

media:content.media:description: The White House later denied any security shortcomings on the new plane.

item.description: The new jet, which President Donald Trump received as a gift from Qatar, entered service last week.
item.content:encoded: The new jet, which President Donald Trump received as a gift from Qatar, entered service last week.

item.title: 36 Aboard Speedboat, Rough Seas: What We Know About Vietnam Tragedy

media:content.media:description: Rescuers look for survivors in the Vietnam boat tragedy

item.description: At least 15 Indian tourists were killed after a speedboat overturned near Vietnam's Phu Quoc Island today. It was carrying 32 tourists and four crew from Hon May Rut to An Thoi Port when it sank. The Indian embassy has shared more information.
item.content:encoded: At least 15 Indian tourists were killed after a speedboat overturned near Vietnam's Phu Quoc Island today. It was carrying 32 tourists and four crew from Hon May Rut to An Thoi Port when it sank. The Indian embassy has shared more information.

item.title: "Pledge To Avenge His Blood": Mojtaba Khamenei On Father's Funeral

media:content.media:description: Mojtaba Khamenei said that the vengeance of Iran must "inevitably be carried out"

item.description: The statement was released on the occasion of the funeral ceremonies of Ali Khamenei, which were held months after he was killed in the US-Israeli strikes on his office in Tehran on February 28.
item.content:encoded: The statement was released on the occasion of the funeral ceremonies of Ali Khamenei, which were held months after he was killed in the US-Israeli strikes on his office in Tehran on February 28.

item.title: S Jaishankar To Launch India's UN Security Council Bid. Why It Matters

media:content.media:description: India is a non-permanent member of the UNSC

item.description: The campaign is the first step in India's bid to take its place in the Asia-Pacific bloc.
item.content:encoded: The campaign is the first step in India's bid to take its place in the Asia-Pacific bloc.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Wants "To Make A Deal So Badly". A Look At Times He's Claimed That
item.description: Donald Trump has repeatedly said that an agreement with Iran to end the war is close.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump has repeatedly said that an agreement with Iran to end the war is close.

item.title: China's New Mega Dam Near Indian Border Poses Huge Geological Risk: Report

media:content.media:description: Construction work of a dam in Yarlung Tsangpo River has picked up pace in recent months

item.description: China is building the world's largest hydroelectric dam in the lower parts of the Yarlung Tsangpo River in Tibet, about 50 kilometres from the border with India.
item.content:encoded: China is building the world's largest hydroelectric dam in the lower parts of the Yarlung Tsangpo River in Tibet, about 50 kilometres from the border with India.

item.title: Why Vladimir Putin's 'Shadow Fleet' Tankers Are Taking Longer Routes

media:content.media:description: The longer route is adding days to voyages and increasing costs (File photo)

item.description: Russia's sanctioned oil tankers are avoiding the English Channel after Britain seized a vessel from Moscow's "shadow fleet" last month.
item.content:encoded: Russia's sanctioned oil tankers are avoiding the English Channel after Britain seized a vessel from Moscow's "shadow fleet" last month.

item.title: 'No Longer Part Of Probe': Suspect Arrested In Ex-UK MP Murder Case Released
item.description: Ann Widdecombe, 78, was known for her socially conservative views, first as a junior minister in Conservative prime minister John Major's 1992-1997 government.
item.content:encoded: Ann Widdecombe, 78, was known for her socially conservative views, first as a junior minister in Conservative prime minister John Major's 1992-1997 government.

item.title: 'Lots Of Opportunities' For India, Australia In AI, Tech: Minister To NDTV

media:content.media:description: PM Narendra Modi and Australian PM Anthony Albanese at the Melbourne Cricket Ground in Australia

item.description: At the heart of PM Narendra Modi's visit to Australia is the newly unveiled PACTS framework, an agreement built around supply chain resilience, critical technology sharing, cybersecurity and defence research collaboration.
item.content:encoded: At the heart of PM Narendra Modi's visit to Australia is the newly unveiled PACTS framework, an agreement built around supply chain resilience, critical technology sharing, cybersecurity and defence research collaboration.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Explosions Heard In Tehran For 2nd Straight Day

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.
item.content:encoded: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.

item.title: The New Cold War: America Invents, China Deploys

media:content.media:description: China's dramatic sea-based rocket recovery (L) ends America's monopoly on reusable launch technology.

item.description: The contest has shifted from who discovers to who can industrialise faster
item.content:encoded: The contest has shifted from who discovers to who can industrialise faster

item.title: Trump's Iran War Conundrum, Shifting Stance And What's Next
item.description: The ceasefire calmed down the hostilities that began on February 28 but did nothing to solve the major issues that Washington and Tehran have with each other.
item.content:encoded: The ceasefire calmed down the hostilities that began on February 28 but did nothing to solve the major issues that Washington and Tehran have with each other.

item.title: Meta Discontinues AI Image Feature Days After Backlash Over Privacy Concerns

media:content.media:description: The feature faced backlash over privacy concerns.

item.description: Meta, owner of Facebook and Instagram, had launched Muse Image on Tuesday, its first image-generation model from Meta Superintelligence Labs.
item.content:encoded: Meta, owner of Facebook and Instagram, had launched Muse Image on Tuesday, its first image-generation model from Meta Superintelligence Labs.
